title: Alexander Holevo
body: Alexander Semenovich Holevo (Russian: Алекса́ндр Семéнович Хóлево, also spelled as Kholevo and Cholewo) is a Soviet and Russian mathematician, one of the pioneers of quantum information science.
categories: Academic staff of Moscow State University
Academic staff of the Moscow Institute of Physics and Technology
Academic staff of the Steklov Institute of Mathematics
